# ARMAGEDDON Test Suite Certification

> Sandboxed adversarial certification for AI and software systems by APEX Business Systems Ltd. Destruction-grade testing across 13 concurrent adversarial batteries, producing evidence-based, machine-verifiable certification artifacts — not compliance checklists.

ARMAGEDDON runs 13 adversarial batteries concurrently against a target system inside a locked sandbox: chaos stress, chaos engine (idempotency/dedupe), prompt injection (direct, obfuscated, multilingual), security & auth (CSRF, auth churn), full unit/module, unsafe-gate sandbox enforcement, Playwright E2E, asset smoke, integration (OAuth, webhooks, audit events), goal hijack (multi-turn adaptive jailbreaks via real PAIR adversarial engine), tool misuse (SQL injection, API privilege escalation), memory poisoning (vector DB corruption), and supply chain (dependency injection attacks).

Simulation tier runs 10,000 statistical iterations with a <0.01% escape threshold. Certified tier executes real PAIR adversarial attacks with live LLM attacker, target, and judge. Every run produces a signed artifact set: armageddon-report.json (machine-readable), armageddon-report.md (executive + engineering summary), and certificate.pdf (signed verification certificate) with run ID, grade, escape rate, and timestamp.

Tiers: Self-serve (free) → Verified (evidence review) → Certified (release-readiness gate).

## Pages

- [Home](https://armageddontest.icu/): Product overview, the 13 batteries, certification artifact
- [Pricing](https://armageddontest.icu/pricing): Tier comparison — free, Verified, Certified
- [Support](https://armageddontest.icu/support): Support terminal
- [Privacy](https://armageddontest.icu/privacy): Privacy policy

## Notes

- Designed for controlled sandbox testing; does not guarantee breach prevention.
- Not a substitute for SOC 2 / ISO 27001 compliance certification or professional penetration testing.
- Operated by APEX Business Systems Ltd., powered by APEX-OmniHub.
